title: Variant
description: A single skill variant entry in a topic's variants.yaml

author.description: Name of the author. Person or organization.

context_fit.description: When this variant fits. Written by Selva regardless of author.

recommender_note.description: Selva's reason for including. Required when author != Selva. Must be omitted when author == Selva.

source_url.description: Canonical URL for the variant. Required for every variant.

source_skill_url.description: Direct URL to skill.md at source. Recommended for curated variants.

license.description: License of the source skill content. Determines whether the site can cache and render the content inline. Permissive values (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, CC-BY-4.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0, CC0-1.0, ISC, Unlicense, granted-by-author) unlock inline caching; anything else (all-rights-reserved, unknown, GPL-*, proprietary) causes the site to link out.

skill.description: Path (./...) for local, URL (http...) for external.
